summary: Completed testing of Fan Gallery and Clickable Media Gallery features. All backend APIs working correctly (100% pass rate). Frontend code review confirms proper implementation of media viewer modal, fan gallery sections, and hide functionality. Web UI registration has known CORS issue from previous iterations.
